id="aegis-init" data-nscript="afterInteractive">
              const aegisScript = document.createElement('script');
              aegisScript.async = true;
              aegisScript.src = 'https://mediastatic.tencent-cloud.com/static/aegis.1_38_16_min.js';
              aegisScript.onload = () => {
                const initCookit = () => {
                  try {
                    const cookies = document.cookie;
                    if (!cookies) return;
                    const keyValList = cookies.split('; ');
                    return keyValList.reduce((acc, cur) => {
                      const [key, val] = cur.split('=');
                      acc[key] = val;
                      return acc;
                    }, {});
                  } catch(err) {
                  }
                };
                const getCookieVal = (key) => {
                  const cookieObj = initCookit();
                  if (!cookieObj) return '';
                  return cookieObj[key];
                };
                let uin = getCookieVal('uin');
                if (uin) {
                  uin = uin.replace('o', '');
                }
                const beforeUrlList = [
                  'https://www.tencentcloud.com/account/login/saas/getTokenFormSass',
                  'wa.arounddeal.com/wa',
                  'https://intl.cloud.tencent.com/account/login/saas/getTokenFormSass',
                  'https://px.ads.linkedin.com/wa/',
                ];
                window.AegjsLog = new window.Aegis({
                  id: 'nGnp8IKeGVORdr62q1', // 项目key
                  reportApiSpeed: true, // 接口测速
                  reportAssetSpeed: true, // 静态资源测速
                  beforeReportSpeed(msg) {
                    if (!msg.url || beforeUrlList.includes(msg.url) ) {
                      return false;
                    }
                  },
                  hostUrl: 'https://rumt-sg.com',
                  spa: true,
                  api: {
                    apiDetail: true, // 接口异常，上报参数和回包
                    retCodeHandler: function (data, url) {
                      try {
                        data = JSON.parse(data);
                        const whitelistUrl = [
                          'https://wa.arounddeal.com/wa/',
                          'https://sc-rp.tencentcloud.com:8106/sa?project=production',
                          '_next/static/css',
                          '.json?',
                          'TypeError: Failed to fetch',
                          'LINK load fail:',
                          'SCRIPT load fail:',
                          'WeixinJSBridge',
                          'request abort',
                          'apisgp.my-imcloud.com',
                          'ap-nanjing.cls.tencentcs.com',
                          'webim.tim.qq.com',
                          'FETCH_ERROR',
                          "Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'autoplay')",
                          "TypeError: undefined is not an object (evaluating 'a.params.autoplay')",
                          "wa.arounddeal.com/wa",
                          "Can't find variable: gmo",
                          "Error.stack: undefined",
                          "px.ads.linkedin.com",
                          "_next/static/media/headLogo",
                          "_next/static/media/logo.c4f264b6.png",
                          "Unexpected token 'var'",
                          "Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'",
                          "Maximum call stack size exceeded.",
                          "Error.stack: SyntaxError: Unexpected token",
                        ];
                        const loginApiList = [
                          'tencentcloud.com/account/login/saas/getTokenFormSass',
                          'intl.cloud.tencent.com/account/login/saas/getTokenFormSass',
                        ];
                        if (typeof data === 'object' && data !== null) {
                          if (data?.code == 6 && loginApiList.includes(url)) {
                            return {
                              isErr: false,
                              code: data?.code
                            }
                          }
                          if (data.msg) {
                            const isReport = whitelistUrl.some(item => data.msg?.indexOf(item) !== -1);
                            return {
                              isErr: false,
                              code: 0
                            }
                          }
                        } else {
                         const isReport = whitelistUrl.some(item => url?.indexOf(item) !== -1);
                         if (isReport) {
                            return {
                              isErr: false,
                              code: 0
                            }
                         }
                        }
                      } catch (e) {
                      }
                    },
                  },
                  beforeReport(log) {
                    try {
                      const msgWhitelist = [
                        '登录态验证失败，请重新登录',
                        'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications.',
                        'Script error.',
                        'ResizeObserver loop limit exceeded',
                        'https://sc-rp.tencentcloud.com:8106/sa?project=production',
                        'Cannot resolve a Slate node from DOM node',
                        'https://wa.arounddeal.com/wa/',
                        'chrome-extension',
                        'MethodName:update',
                        '_next/static/css',
                        '.json?',
                        'TypeError: Failed to fetch',
                        'LINK load fail:',
                        'SCRIPT load fail:',
                        'WeixinJSBridge',
                        'request abort',
                        'apisgp.my-imcloud.com',
                        'ap-nanjing.cls.tencentcs.com',
                        'webim.tim.qq.com',
                        'FETCH_ERROR',
                        "Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'autoplay')",
                        "TypeError: undefined is not an object (evaluating 'a.params.autoplay')",
                        "wa.arounddeal.com/wa",
                        "Can't find variable: gmo",
                        "Error.stack: undefined",
                        "px.ads.linkedin.com",
                        "_next/static/media/headLogo",
                        "Incorrect fraction digits",
                        "_next/static/media/logo.c4f264b6.png",
                        "Unexpected token 'var'",
                        "Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'",
                        "Maximum call stack size exceeded.",
                        "Error.stack: SyntaxError: Unexpected token",
                      ]
                      const isReport = msgWhitelist.some(item => log.msg.indexOf(item) !== -1);
                      if (isReport) {
                        // 忽略该错误，参考：https://stackoverflow.com/questions/49384120/resizeobserver-loop-limit-exceeded
                        return false;
                      }
                      if (log.msg.indexOf('intl.cloud.tencent.com/account/login/saas/getTokenFormSass') > -1) {
                        return false;
                      }
                      if (
                        (log.level == 1024 || log.level == 16) &&
                        log.msg.indexOf('tencentcloud.com/account/login/saas/getTokenFormSass') > -1
                      ) {
                        return false;
                      }
                    } catch (err) {
                      console.log('aegis error')
                    }
                    return log;
                  },
                });
              }
              document.head.appendChild(aegisScript);

metadata.description: Learn how to quickly integrate TUILiveKit into your project to enable real-time voice chatting. Follow this guide to complete the setup and create a voice chat room in just an hour.
